impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding deterministic expected output for sign permit requirement extraction before any live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Add a redacted, source-backed sign permit requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly seven category records and a narrow fixture validation test.
target_task: Task checkbox-96: Add a minimal sign permit requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly seven category records: eligibility, plan-review applicability, upload requirements, fee/payment checkpoints, corrections, inspections/finalization, and explicit-confirmation gates, all source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
